name: Reliance on Package-level Scope
description: The product relies on Java package-level scope as a security boundary, but Java packages are not access-control mechanisms. Any code placed in the same package can access package-scoped members, making this an ease-of-development feature rather than a security control.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node with package-level (default) visibility containing sensitive data or security-critical operations, without explicit AUTH (access control) enforcement. Look for STRUCTURAL(class) with package-scoped members that are accessed from EXTERNAL contexts.
